intelligence_scores.description: Intelligence test scores of the 9 sampled children from the community, with sample mean x̄=112.8, used to test whether the community's children have above-average intelligence.

population_mean.description: Population mean (μ=100) of the intelligence test scores under the null hypothesis.

population_sd.description: Population standard deviation (σ=15) of the intelligence test scores, used in computing the test statistic.
